chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1969 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 9904/11 3. For hearing of main case 29.01.2019 No one is present on behalf of petitioners and no intimation is received. Record reflects that since filing of this petition on 03.12.2011 the petitioners and their Counsel have never taken any interest to pursue this petition or to get it posted in court. This petition for the first time was fixed in court on 19.12.2018 when noting the above said position the case was adjourned for three weeks but even today no one is present as noted above. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
